Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Nov-16-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Lawrence Hart, Esq. 510-457-3440 Law Offices of Scott Stratman for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

"THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF."

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

1-DEFENDANT ROBER CACERES, ANA CACERES' Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents.

Plaintiff shall serve verified answers, without objection, to Form Interrogatories (Set Number One) and verified responses, without objection, to Demand for Production (Set Number One). Plaintiff shall pay sanctions of $760 to Defendants' attorney, the Law Offices of Scott C. Stratman. The Compliance date is December 6, 2023.

Mr. Hart to submit a proposed form of order to the Court at bruce.highman@highmanlaw.com

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Lawrence Hart, Esq. 510-457-3440 Law Offices of Scott Stratman for Defendant.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

2-DEFENDANT ROBER CACERES, ANA CACERES' Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Attendance At Deposition.

1.Plaintiff shall attend the deposition via remote link on a mutually convenient date and time, on or before November 27, 2023.

2.Plaintiff shall pay the monetary sanctions on or before December 6, 2023
